message:
fix(fr-command): XRANGE/XREVRANGE trailing-arg arity returns syntax error [bd-frankenredis-xrangearity]

XRANGE/XREVRANGE with malformed trailing arg counts (e.g. 5 args
instead of the expected 4 or 6 with COUNT) were emitting
WrongArity. Upstream t_stream.c::xrangeGenericCommand emits
'ERR syntax error' for the >4-but-not-6 case (the
'malformed-COUNT-segment' path). Fixed by splitting the arity
check: < 4 still emits WrongArity, but the in-range mismatch
emits SyntaxError.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
